uplink.description: Full metering frame 0x09 (33 bytes): energy + instantaneous power, voltage, current, frequency
uplink._note: Oracle: expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js on this input; voltage 2301 dV -> 230.1 V, current 10000 mA -> 10 A, period 20000 us -> 50 Hz. Covers all four power-meter atLeastOne keys.

uplink.description: Short metering frame 0x09 (21 bytes): cumulative energy + activation only
uplink._note: Oracle: expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js; short variant has no instantaneous power block. Satisfies power-meter via metering.energy.total.

uplink.description: Unsupported frame id (0x04 TER frame routed to this power codec)
uplink._note: The MCF-LW12MET emits metering frame 0x09; a non-0x09 id is rejected.
Frame shorter than the 21-byte minimum is rejected.
